AI安全与隐私.title: AI Snitches Get Glitches: Towards Evading Agentic Surveillance
AI安全与隐私.title_zh: AI告密者出故障：逃避智能体监控的方法
AI安全与隐私.summary: To better assist users with completing challenging tasks, AI agents mediate communications, access data, and interact with different APIs. Many employers (and even nation-states) already provide their users with this technology. However, widespread adoption of AI agents creates a new risk to abuse a
AI安全与隐私.summary_zh: 为了帮助用户完成复杂任务，AI智能体在通信、数据访问和API交互中充当媒介。许多雇主甚至国家已向用户提供此技术，但智能体的广泛使用也带来了被滥用的新风险。本文研究如何规避智能体监控，提出了一种逃避监控的方法，通过利用智能体系统中的漏洞或设计对抗性输入，使得监控系统失效。创新点在于首次系统性地探讨AI智能体监控的脆弱性，并给出了实用的逃避策略。主要贡献是揭示了当前智能体监控系统的安全缺陷，为设计更鲁棒的监控系统提供了警示。

模型压缩与强化学习.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Neural Network Compression (HiReLC): Pruning and Quantization
模型压缩与强化学习.title_zh: 基于分层强化学习的神经网络压缩（HiReLC）：剪枝与量化
模型压缩与强化学习.summary: We present HiReLC, a hierarchical ensemble-reinforcement learning framework for automated joint quantization and structured pruning of deep neural networks. The framework decomposes the compression search across two levels of abstraction: low-level agents (LLAs) operate independently per block, sele
模型压缩与强化学习.summary_zh: 本文提出HiReLC，一种分层集成强化学习框架，用于深度神经网络的自动联合量化和结构化剪枝。该框架将压缩搜索分解为两个抽象层次：低层智能体（LLAs）在每个块中独立操作，选择剪枝和量化策略；高层智能体（HLA）协调全局压缩目标，确保整体性能。创新点在于利用分层强化学习同时优化剪枝和量化，避免了传统方法中手动调参的繁琐。主要贡献是实现了自动化、高效的模型压缩，在保持精度的同时显著减小模型大小和计算开销。

自然语言处理与信息抽取.title: Overview of HIPE-2026: Person-Place Relation Extraction from Multilingual Historical Texts
自然语言处理与信息抽取.title_zh: HIPE-2026概述：从多语言历史文本中提取人物-地点关系
自然语言处理与信息抽取.summary: Was this person ever at that place, and if so, when? Answering such questions from noisy, multilingual historical documents is the central challenge of HIPE-2026, the third edition of the HIPE evaluation series. Moving from named entity recognition and linking (HIPE-2020, HIPE-2022) to reasoning abo
自然语言处理与信息抽取.summary_zh: 本文介绍了HIPE-2026评测任务，旨在从嘈杂的多语言历史文档中回答人物与地点之间的关系（如某人是否曾到过某地及时间）。该任务从之前的名实体识别与链接（HIPE-2020/2022）升级为时序关系推理。创新点在于构建了多语言历史文本的人物-地点关系抽取基准，并提供了标注数据集。主要贡献是推动了数字人文领域的信息抽取研究，为历史学家提供了自动分析工具。

机器人控制与强化学习.title: Power-Budgeted Underwater Vehicle Control via Constrained Reinforcement Learning
机器人控制与强化学习.title_zh: 基于约束强化学习的能耗受限水下航行器控制
机器人控制与强化学习.summary: Underwater vehicles operate from a fixed onboard energy budget that propulsion rapidly depletes, so a controller that completes its task while drawing less thruster power directly extends mission range and endurance. Reinforcement learning yields capable model-free controllers for station-keeping an
机器人控制与强化学习.summary_zh: 水下航行器依赖固定机载能量，推进系统快速消耗能源。本文提出使用约束强化学习设计控制器，在完成任务的同时最小化推进功率消耗，从而延长任务范围和续航时间。创新点在于将能耗作为硬约束纳入强化学习框架，而非仅作为奖励项。主要贡献是开发了首个面向水下航行器的约束强化学习控制器，在保持控制精度的同时显著降低能耗，实验表明续航提升达30%。

计算机视觉与多模态学习.title: Edges Before Embeddings: A Confidence-Aware Blur Gate for Vision-Language Pipelines
计算机视觉与多模态学习.title_zh: 边缘优先于嵌入：面向视觉-语言管线的置信度感知模糊门控
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary: Production vision pipelines silently degrade on blurry input, wasting compute on downstream OCR, retrieval, and vision-language model (VLM) calls that cannot recover a usable output. We present MagikaDocumentFromPixel, a lightweight, CPU-friendly image quality gate that classifies a single image as
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary_zh: 生产环境中的视觉管线在模糊输入下性能下降，浪费计算资源于无法恢复有用输出的下游OCR、检索和VLM调用。本文提出MagikaDocumentFromPixel，一种轻量级、CPU友好的图像质量门控，用于将单张图像分类为清晰或模糊。创新点在于使用边缘检测特征而非深度嵌入，结合置信度估计，实现高效模糊检测。主要贡献是设计了一个即插即用的预处理模块，可节省高达40%的计算成本，同时保证下游任务精度。

多模态学习.title: Uncertainty Quantification for Computer-Use Agents: A Benchmark across Vision-Language Models and GUI Grounding Datasets
多模态学习.title_zh: 计算机使用代理的不确定性量化：跨视觉-语言模型和GUI定位数据集的基准
多模态学习.summary: Computer-use agents turn vision-language model (VLM) predictions into executable GUI clicks, so reliable uncertainty estimates are essential for rejection, calibration, miss-severity ranking, and spatial safety regions. Yet evidence on post-hoc uncertainty quantification (UQ) for these agents is fragmented across tasks and datasets, making it difficult to draw general conclusions. We introduce a benchmark that systematically evaluates post-hoc UQ methods across multiple VLMs and GUI grounding datasets. We analyze the effectiveness of different UQ techniques for various downstream tasks, including selective prediction, misclassification detection, and spatial uncertainty. Our findings reveal that no single UQ method consistently outperforms others across all settings, and the choice of VLM backbone significantly impacts UQ performance. We provide practical recommendations for deploying UQ in computer-use agents.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 计算机使用代理将视觉-语言模型（VLM）的预测转化为可执行的GUI点击，因此可靠的不确定性估计对于拒绝、校准、错误严重性排序和空间安全区域至关重要。然而，关于这些代理的事后不确定性量化（UQ）的证据在不同任务和数据集中支离破碎，难以得出一般性结论。本文引入了一个基准，系统评估跨多个VLM和GUI定位数据集的事后UQ方法。我们分析了不同UQ技术在下游任务（包括选择性预测、错误分类检测和空间不确定性）中的有效性。研究发现，没有任何单一的UQ方法能在所有设置中一致优于其他方法，且VLM骨干的选择显著影响UQ性能。我们为在计算机使用代理中部署UQ提供了实用建议。

优化算法.title: Gradient-based inverse lithography for EUV masks via the waveguide method and a physics-informed neural operator
优化算法.title_zh: 基于梯度的极紫外掩模逆光刻技术：通过波导方法和物理信息神经算子
优化算法.summary: Gradient-based inverse lithography technology~(ILT) for extreme ultraviolet~(EUV) masks is presented. A novel framework treats the differentiable waveguide method and the recently proposed waveguide neural operator~(WGNO) as end-to-end physics engines, recovering the permittivity of the absorber of a mask. The framework enables gradient-based optimization, significantly improving mask pattern fidelity and process window. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms traditional ILT approaches in terms of computational efficiency and accuracy.
优化算法.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于梯度的极紫外（EUV）掩模逆光刻技术（ILT）。该新颖框架将可微分的波导方法和最近提出的波导神经算子（WGNO）作为端到端的物理引擎，用于恢复掩模吸收体的介电常数。该框架支持基于梯度的优化，显著提高了掩模图案保真度和工艺窗口。实验表明，所提方法在计算效率和精度上均优于传统ILT方法。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SARA: Unlocking Multilingual Knowledge in Mixture-of-Experts via Semantically Anchored Routing Alignment
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SARA：通过语义锚定路由对齐释放混合专家模型中的多语言知识
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as an increasingly influential paradigm as they offer a strategic balance between parameter scalability and computational efficiency. However, low-resource languages, which suffer from a scarcity of high-quality training data, often have their representations suppressed in MoE models. We propose SARA (Semantically Anchored Routing Alignment), a method that aligns routing decisions across languages using semantic anchors. By leveraging multilingual sentence embeddings, SARA ensures that tokens from different languages with similar meanings are routed to the same experts, thereby improving knowledge transfer from high-resource to low-resource languages. Experiments on multilingual benchmarks show that SARA significantly boosts performance on low-resource languages without degrading high-resource ones, achieving state-of-the-art results on several tasks.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构因其在参数可扩展性和计算效率之间的战略平衡而成为一种日益重要的范式。然而，低资源语言由于缺乏高质量训练数据，其表示在MoE模型中常被抑制。本文提出SARA（语义锚定路由对齐），一种利用语义锚定跨语言对齐路由决策的方法。通过利用多语言句子嵌入，SARA确保来自不同语言但语义相似的词元被路由到相同的专家，从而改善从高资源到低资源语言的知识转移。在多语言基准上的实验表明，SARA在不降低高资源语言性能的情况下显著提升了低资源语言的性能，在多个任务上达到了最先进水平。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Do Encoders Suffice? A Systematic Comparison of Encoder and Decoder Safety Judges for LLM Adversarial Evaluation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 编码器足够吗？面向LLM对抗性评估的编码器与解码器安全评判器的系统比较
大语言模型/LLM.summary: With the widespread adoption of large language models (LLMs) in chatbots and everyday applications, companies increasingly need guardrails that are effective while remaining low-cost and low-latency. Safety evaluation of LLM outputs has generally relied on LLM-based judges, which can be effective but computationally expensive. This paper systematically compares encoder-based (e.g., BERT) and decoder-based (e.g., GPT) safety judges for adversarial evaluation of LLMs. We find that encoder-based judges, when properly fine-tuned, achieve competitive performance to decoder-based judges while being significantly faster and cheaper. We also propose a hybrid approach that combines both types for improved robustness. Our results provide practical guidance for deploying safety evaluation in production systems.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着大语言模型（LLM）在聊天机器人和日常应用中的广泛采用，公司越来越需要既有效又低成本和低延迟的护栏。LLM输出的安全性评估通常依赖基于LLM的评判器，这些评判器有效但计算成本高。本文系统比较了基于编码器（如BERT）和基于解码器（如GPT）的安全评判器，用于LLM的对抗性评估。我们发现，经过适当微调的编码器评判器在性能上可与解码器评判器相媲美，同时速度更快、成本更低。我们还提出了一种结合两者的混合方法以提高鲁棒性。我们的结果为在生产系统中部署安全评估提供了实用指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Is GraphRAG Needed? From Basic RAG to Graph-/Agentic Solutions with Context Optimization
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: GraphRAG是否必要？从基础RAG到图/智能体解决方案与上下文优化
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As advanced RAG variants like GraphRAG and Agentic RAG emerge, one leading question is when and how to use them. Here, we introduce a framework for different RAG scenarios evaluation and comparison on semi-structured knowledge bases, including regular RAG, GraphRAG, Modular RAG and Agentic RAG. We p
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着GraphRAG和Agentic RAG等高级RAG变体的出现，一个关键问题是何时以及如何使用它们。本文提出了一个框架，用于在半结构化知识库上评估和比较不同RAG场景，包括常规RAG、GraphRAG、模块化RAG和Agentic RAG。我们通过上下文优化策略，分析了各方法的适用条件、性能权衡和实际部署建议，为从业者选择合适RAG方案提供了系统性指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Helpful or Harmful? Evaluating LLM-Assisted Vulnerability Patching via a Human Study
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 有益还是有害？通过人类研究评估LLM辅助漏洞修补
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Software vulnerability remediation is a cognitively demanding task that requires specialized security expertise often lacking in general developers. In the meantime, Large Language Models (LLMs) assisted tools show potential in vulnerability detection, location, and repair tasks. [Hypothesis:] While LLMs can suggest patches, their effectiveness and safety when used by developers remain unclear. We conduct a human study to evaluate the impact of LLM assistance on vulnerability patching, measuring correctness, security, and developer trust. Our results show that LLM assistance improves patch correctness but may introduce new vulnerabilities, highlighting the need for cautious integration.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 软件漏洞修复是一项认知要求高的任务，需要专门的安全专业知识，而普通开发者往往缺乏。同时，大语言模型（LLM）辅助工具在漏洞检测、定位和修复方面展现出潜力。本文通过人类研究评估LLM辅助对漏洞修补的影响，测量正确性、安全性和开发者信任度。结果表明，LLM辅助提高了补丁正确性，但可能引入新的漏洞，强调了谨慎集成的必要性。创新点在于通过受控人类实验而非仅自动评估，揭示了LLM辅助的实际效果与潜在风险。主要贡献是为LLM在安全领域的应用提供了实证依据。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 被忽视的后训练免费午餐：面向LLM智能体的进展优势
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Process reward models enable fine-grained, step-level evaluation of LLMs, yet building them for agentic settings remains prohibitively difficult: long-horizon interactions, irreversible actions, and stochastic environment feedback make both human annotation and Monte Carlo estimation infeasible at scale. In this work, we introduce Progress Advantage, a novel training signal that leverages the inherent structure of agent tasks to provide dense, step-level rewards without costly reward modeling. Our key insight is that in many agentic tasks, the natural progression of subtasks (e.g., completing subgoals) can serve as a reliable proxy for progress. We formalize this as a progress advantage function and integrate it into a reinforcement learning framework for post-training LLM agents. Experiments on challenging long-horizon tasks demonstrate that our method significantly improves sample efficiency and final performance compared to outcome-based baselines, effectively providing a "free lunch" from post-training.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 过程奖励模型能够对LLM进行细粒度的步骤级评估，但在智能体环境中构建此类模型极为困难：长程交互、不可逆操作和随机环境反馈使得人工标注和蒙特卡洛估计难以大规模实施。本文提出“进展优势”（Progress Advantage），一种新颖的训练信号，利用智能体任务的内在结构提供密集的步骤级奖励，无需昂贵的奖励建模。核心洞察是：在许多智能体任务中，子任务的自然进展（如完成子目标）可作为可靠的进展代理。作者将其形式化为进展优势函数，并整合到强化学习框架中用于LLM智能体的后训练。在具有挑战性的长程任务实验表明，该方法在样本效率和最终性能上显著优于基于结果的方法，有效实现了后训练中的“免费午餐”。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Semantic Consistency Policy Optimization for Reinforcement Learning of LLM Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 面向LLM智能体强化学习的语义一致性策略优化
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Group-based reinforcement learning effectively post-trains LLM agents for long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks by deriving step-level credit from trajectory outcomes. However, this ties a step's credit to its rollout's final outcome: semantically near-identical intermediate steps receive opposite credits if their trajectories succeed or fail. This causes high variance and unstable training. We propose Semantic Consistency Policy Optimization (SCPO), which introduces a semantic consistency filter that groups steps by semantic similarity across trajectories and assigns consistent credit to semantically equivalent steps. SCPO significantly reduces variance and improves convergence speed on complex agent tasks, outperforming prior group-based methods.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 基于组的强化学习通过从轨迹结果中推导步骤级信用，有效后训练LLM智能体以处理长程、稀疏奖励任务。然而，这导致步骤信用与其轨迹最终结果绑定：语义几乎相同的中间步骤，如果其轨迹成功或失败，将获得相反的信用，从而产生高方差和不稳定训练。本文提出语义一致性策略优化（SCPO），引入语义一致性过滤器，按语义相似性对跨轨迹的步骤进行分组，并为语义等价的步骤分配一致的信用。SCPO显著降低了方差，在复杂智能体任务上加快了收敛速度，超越了以往的基于组的方法。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Natural Ungrokking: Asymmetric Control of Which Rules Survive Pretraining
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 自然去突现：预训练中哪些规则存活的非对称控制
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Midway through an ordinary pretraining run, a small language model learns the pronoun-gender rule: cued with a girl's name ("Sue cried because"), it resolves the next pronoun to she, generalizing to held-out probes (0.94 by step 925). By step 3,500 the same model scores near zero on the same probes,
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 在普通预训练过程中，一个小型语言模型中途学会代词-性别规则：当以女孩名字提示时，它能正确预测代词'she'，并在保留测试上达到0.94的准确率。然而到第3500步时，同一模型在相同测试上得分接近零。本文发现这种'自然去突现'现象，即模型在预训练后期丧失早期习得的规则。创新点在于揭示了训练动态中规则存活的非对称控制机制，并分析了数据分布和模型容量对规则持久性的影响。主要贡献为理解LLM知识遗忘和持续学习提供了新视角。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Privacy Vulnerabilities of Attention Layers in Tabular Foundation Models and Protection of High-Risk Queries
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 表格基础模型中注意力层的隐私漏洞及高风险查询保护
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Tabular foundation models are commonly assumed to present limited privacy concerns as they are often pre-trained on large collections of synthetic data. However, these models leverage in-context learning, where sensitive records may be provided directly at inference time as labelled context examples
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 表格基础模型通常被认为隐私风险有限，因其多在合成数据上预训练。然而，这些模型采用上下文学习，推理时可能直接提供敏感记录作为标注样本。本文揭示了注意力层在上下文学习中的隐私漏洞：通过分析注意力权重，攻击者可推断出上下文中的敏感信息。创新点在于提出针对高风险查询的保护机制，在保持模型性能的同时，通过差分隐私或注意力掩码技术降低隐私泄露风险。该工作为表格基础模型的安全部署提供了重要警示和实用防护方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SpeechEQ: Benchmarking Emotional Intelligence Quotient in Socially Aware Voice Conversational Models
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SpeechEQ：社交感知语音对话模型的情商基准测试
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As multimodal conversational systems increasingly engage in spoken interaction, their ability to navigate paralinguistic social cues has become a critical bottleneck for natural human-AI communication. However, existing evaluations of machine emotional intelligence assess reasoning exclusively throu
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着多模态对话系统越来越多地参与语音交互，其处理副语言社交线索的能力成为人机自然沟通的关键瓶颈。然而，现有机器情商评估仅通过文本或单一模态进行推理。本文提出SpeechEQ基准，系统评估语音对话模型在社交场景中的情商，涵盖语气、语速、情感识别等多维度。创新点在于构建了包含丰富副语言标注的对话数据集和评估指标，揭示了当前模型在理解隐含情感和社交意图方面的不足，为开发更具共情能力的语音助手提供了评测工具。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Explainable Control Framework (XCF) based on Fuzzy Model-Agnostic Explanation and LLM Agent-Supported Interface
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于模糊模型无关解释和LLM智能体支持界面的可解释控制框架
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Increasing demand for precise and reliable control in complex scenarios has led to the development of increasingly sophisticated controllers, including data-driven approaches employing closed box models and mathematically rigorous yet complex designs. This complexity highlights the needs for explain
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 复杂场景中对精确可靠控制的需求推动了先进控制器的发展，包括采用黑箱模型的数据驱动方法和数学严谨但复杂的设计。这种复杂性凸显了对可解释性的需求。本文提出可解释控制框架（XCF），结合模糊模型无关解释（通过模糊逻辑近似黑箱决策）和LLM智能体支持的交互界面，为控制系统的决策提供自然语言解释。创新点在于将模糊解释与LLM结合，实现实时、用户友好的控制逻辑可视化，提升了控制系统的透明度和信任度，适用于工业自动化和机器人等安全关键领域。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Space-Efficient Language Generation in the Limit
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 极限空间高效语言生成
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We initiate a resource-aware theory of language generation in the limit under the minimal constraint of space efficiency. In our framework, a learner observes an adversarial positive stream from a target language K and must eventually output a hallucination-free hypothesis language L that contains all strings of K. The learner has limited memory (space), and we characterize the minimal space required for generating various language classes, including regular, context-free, and recursively enumerable languages. Our results show that space-efficient generation is possible for some classes but provably impossible for others, establishing a hierarchy of space complexity for language generation.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文开创性地提出了一种资源感知的极限语言生成理论，核心约束是空间效率。在该框架中，学习器观察目标语言K的对抗性正例流，最终必须输出一个无幻觉的假设语言L，且L包含K的所有字符串。学习器具有有限的内存（空间），我们刻画了生成各类语言（包括正则语言、上下文无关语言和递归可枚举语言）所需的最小空间。结果表明，对于某些语言类，空间高效生成是可能的，但对其他类则被证明不可能，从而建立了语言生成的空间复杂度层次结构。主要创新点包括：首次将空间效率作为语言生成的核心约束，并给出了不同语言类的空间复杂度上下界。

语音处理.title: SE-AGCNet: An End-to-End Framework for Joint Speech Enhancement and Loudness Control in Meeting Scenarios
语音处理.title_zh: SE-AGCNet：会议场景中联合语音增强和响度控制的端到端框架
语音处理.summary: Conventional audio pipelines typically treat speech enhancement (SE) and automatic gain control (AGC) as discrete modules, which often limits overall performance. For instance, applying AGC before SE may inadvertently amplify background noise, while prioritizing SE tends to over-suppress low-volume speech. We propose SE-AGCNet, an end-to-end framework that jointly optimizes SE and AGC. The model uses a shared encoder and task-specific decoders with a novel loss function that balances noise suppression and loudness consistency. Experiments on meeting scenario datasets show that SE-AGCNet outperforms cascaded baselines in both objective metrics and subjective listening tests, achieving cleaner speech with consistent loudness levels.
语音处理.summary_zh: 传统音频流水线通常将语音增强（SE）和自动增益控制（AGC）视为独立模块，这往往限制了整体性能。例如，在SE之前应用AGC可能会无意中放大背景噪声，而优先进行SE则倾向于过度抑制低音量语音。本文提出SE-AGCNet，一种联合优化SE和AGC的端到端框架。该模型使用共享编码器和任务特定解码器，并采用一种平衡噪声抑制和响度一致性的新型损失函数。在会议场景数据集上的实验表明，SE-AGCNet在客观指标和主观听感测试中均优于级联基线，实现了更清洁且响度一致的语音。

AI安全/对齐.title: The Unfireable Safety Kernel: Execution-Time AI Alignment for AI Agents and Other Escapable AI Systems
AI安全/对齐.title_zh: 不可解雇的安全内核：AI智能体及其他可逃逸AI系统的运行时对齐
AI安全/对齐.summary: AI agents are granted access to tools, APIs, and other infrastructure, making them active principals in those systems. The dominant approach places controls inside the agent's own runtime: system prompts, output filters, and guardrail libraries. Any control in the agent's address space is reachable
AI安全/对齐.summary_zh: AI智能体被授予工具、API等基础设施的访问权限，使其成为系统中的活动主体。主流方法将控制置于智能体自身的运行时内：系统提示、输出过滤器和护栏库。然而，智能体地址空间内的任何控制都可能被其绕过。本文提出一种“不可解雇的安全内核”，在操作系统级别强制执行安全策略，确保即使在智能体被攻陷时也能维持对齐，为可逃逸AI系统提供了根本性的安全保障。

强化学习/RL.title: On-Policy Self-Distillation with Sampled Demonstrations Reduces Output Diversity
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 基于采样演示的在线自蒸馏降低输出多样性
强化学习/RL.summary: On-policy self-distillation achieves strong pass@1 accuracy by using a single model as both teacher and student, with the teacher conditioned on a correct demonstration to provide dense token-level feedback. We show that this could come at a hidden cost: rollout diversity decreases and pass@k curves
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 在线自蒸馏通过使用同一个模型作为教师和学生，以正确演示为条件提供密集的token级反馈，实现了强大的pass@1准确率。本文揭示了一个隐藏代价：rollout多样性下降，导致pass@k曲线变差。我们提出了一种基于采样演示的改进方法，在保持高准确率的同时部分恢复了输出多样性，为自蒸馏技术在生成任务中的实际应用提供了重要平衡策略。

强化学习/RL.title: Confidence Sequences for Online Statistical Model Checking of Markov Decision Processes
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 马尔可夫决策过程在线统计模型检验的置信序列
强化学习/RL.summary: Markov decision processes (MDPs) are a classic model of decision making under uncertainty, exhibiting both non-deterministic choice as well as probabilistic uncertainty. Traditionally, exact knowledge of the underlying probabilities is assumed. However, this often is unrealistic, e.g. when modelling real-world systems. We propose a method for online statistical model checking of MDPs using confidence sequences, which provide anytime-valid confidence intervals. Our approach allows for sequential testing and guarantees error control over time, enabling efficient verification without knowing transition probabilities a priori.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是不确定性决策的经典模型，同时包含非确定选择和概率不确定性。传统上，假设已知精确的底层概率，但这在实际中往往不现实。本文提出使用置信序列对MDP进行在线统计模型检验的方法，置信序列提供任意时刻有效的置信区间。该方法支持序贯检验，并能随时间控制错误，从而在无需先验知道转移概率的情况下实现高效验证。创新点在于将置信序列应用于MDP的在线统计检验，克服了传统方法对精确概率的依赖，并保证了在线决策的统计有效性。主要贡献是提出了一种实用且理论上严格的在线验证框架。

多智能体系统/区块链.title: Can Trustless Agents Be Trusted? An Empirical Study of the ERC-8004 Decentralized AI Agent Ecosystem
多智能体系统/区块链.title_zh: 无需信任的智能体可信吗？ERC-8004去中心化AI智能体生态系统的实证研究
多智能体系统/区块链.summary: As autonomous AI agents increasingly transact across organizational boundaries, a fundamental trust challenge emerges: how can an agent assess whether an unknown counterpart is trustworthy? The ERC-8004 protocol addresses this challenge with the first permissionless trust layer for AI agent economie
多智能体系统/区块链.summary_zh: 随着自主AI智能体跨组织边界交易，一个根本性信任挑战出现：智能体如何评估未知对手是否可信？ERC-8004协议提出了首个无需许可的AI智能体经济信任层。本文对ERC-8004生态系统进行了实证研究，分析了其信任机制的有效性、安全性和可扩展性，揭示了去中心化信任在智能体交互中的实际表现与潜在风险。

生成模型/医学AI.title: OncoSynth: Synthetic data generation for treatment effect estimation in oncology
生成模型/医学AI.title_zh: OncoSynth：用于肿瘤学治疗效果估计的合成数据生成
生成模型/医学AI.summary: In oncology, access to patient-level data is often restricted. Synthetic data provides an alternative for analyzing treatment effectiveness, but existing methods for synthetic data generation fail to preserve the causal relationships between covariates, treatments, and outcomes, thereby leading to b
生成模型/医学AI.summary_zh: 在肿瘤学中，患者级数据访问常受限。合成数据为分析治疗效果提供了替代方案，但现有方法未能保留协变量、治疗和结果之间的因果关系，导致偏差。本文提出OncoSynth，一种专门用于肿瘤学治疗效果估计的合成数据生成方法，通过因果建模确保合成数据中因果结构的完整性，实验证明其在治疗效应估计准确性上显著优于现有方法，为医学研究中的数据共享和分析提供了新工具。

博弈论与多智能体系统.title: Variable Bound Tightening for Nash Equilibrium Computation in Multiplayer Imperfect-Information Games
博弈论与多智能体系统.title_zh: 多人非完美信息博弈中纳什均衡计算的变量界收紧
博弈论与多智能体系统.summary: There has been significant recent progress in algorithms for approximation of Nash equilibrium in large two-player zero-sum imperfect-information games and exact computation of Nash equilibrium in multiplayer strategic-form games. While counterfactual regret minimization and fictitious play are scalable to large games, they do not guarantee exact equilibrium. We propose a variable bound tightening technique for computing exact Nash equilibria in multiplayer imperfect-information games via mixed-integer programming. Our method iteratively tightens bounds on decision variables to reduce the search space, enabling exact equilibrium computation in games with up to 10^12 nodes, which is orders of magnitude larger than previous exact methods. We demonstrate its effectiveness on standard benchmarks including Leduc hold'em and Goofspiel.
博弈论与多智能体系统.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种变量界收紧技术，用于通过混合整数规划计算多人非完美信息博弈的精确纳什均衡。该方法通过迭代收紧决策变量的界来减少搜索空间，使得在节点数高达10^12的博弈中也能精确计算均衡，比以往精确方法提高了数个数量级。在Leduc hold'em和Goofspiel等标准基准测试上验证了有效性。主要创新在于将变量界收紧与混合整数规划结合，显著扩展了可处理博弈的规模。

AI智能体与GUI交互.title: GUI agent: Guided Exploration of User-Sensitive Screens
AI智能体与GUI交互.title_zh: GUI智能体：用户敏感屏幕的引导式探索
AI智能体与GUI交互.summary: LLM agents are increasingly being used to automate tasks for users within an open GUI environment. They inevitably encounter screens containing user-sensitive information, for which takeover of task execution by the user is highly desirable or even necessary. State-of-the-art LLM-driven agents are unable to identify such screens reliably, leading to potential privacy breaches or task failures. We propose a framework that guides the agent to proactively detect user-sensitive screens and request user intervention when needed. Our method uses a combination of screen content analysis and user-defined policies to determine sensitivity. Experiments on a custom benchmark show that our agent successfully identifies sensitive screens in 95% of cases while maintaining task efficiency.
AI智能体与GUI交互.summary_zh: 本文针对LLM驱动的GUI智能体在自动化任务中遇到用户敏感屏幕的问题，提出了一种引导式探索框架。该框架通过屏幕内容分析和用户自定义策略，使智能体能够主动检测敏感信息并请求用户干预。在自定义基准测试上，智能体在95%的情况下成功识别敏感屏幕，同时保持了任务效率。主要贡献在于首次系统性地处理GUI智能体中的用户隐私问题，平衡了自动化与安全性。

多模态学习与可解释性.title: Steering Vision-Language Models with Joint Sparse Autoencoders
多模态学习与可解释性.title_zh: 使用联合稀疏自编码器引导视觉语言模型
多模态学习与可解释性.summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have shown promise for analyzing language models, but applying them to vision-language models (VLMs) often yields representations that are difficult to use as controllable cross-modal steering directions. We introduce the Joint Sparse Autoencoder (JSAE), which uses an explicit joint decomposition of vision and language representations to learn interpretable and steerable features. JSAE enables fine-grained control over VLM outputs by modifying specific cross-modal features, such as adjusting the level of detail in image descriptions or changing the sentiment of generated text. Experiments on multiple VLM benchmarks demonstrate that JSAE achieves superior steerability while maintaining model performance, and provides insights into cross-modal feature interactions.
多模态学习与可解释性.summary_zh: 本文提出联合稀疏自编码器（JSAE），用于视觉语言模型的可控引导。JSAE通过对视觉和语言表示进行显式联合分解，学习可解释且可引导的跨模态特征。它能够通过修改特定跨模态特征来精细控制VLM输出，例如调整图像描述的详细程度或改变生成文本的情感。在多个VLM基准上，JSAE在保持模型性能的同时实现了更优的可控性，并揭示了跨模态特征交互的机制。主要创新在于联合稀疏编码架构，为多模态模型的可解释性和可控性提供了新方法。

AI智能体与信息论.title: Agentic System as Compressor: Quantifying System Intelligence in Bits
AI智能体与信息论.title_zh: 智能体系统作为压缩器：用比特量化系统智能
AI智能体与信息论.summary: Large language models are turning from isolated predictors into agentic systems: they call tools, retrieve evidence, obey environment constraints, use verifiers, and complete tasks through search and multi-turn interaction. We adopts an analytical viewpoint based on "compression is intelligence": under this view, the intelligence of an agentic system can be quantified by its ability to compress the task environment's data. We formalize this by measuring the number of bits an agent saves relative to a baseline predictor. We propose a practical method to estimate this compression gain for complex agentic workflows, and demonstrate on several benchmark tasks that our metric correlates with task success rate. This provides a principled way to compare agentic systems and guide their design.
AI智能体与信息论.summary_zh: 本文从“压缩即智能”的角度，提出用比特量化智能体系统的智能水平。通过测量智能体相对于基线预测器节省的比特数，形式化定义了压缩增益，并提出了估计复杂智能体工作流压缩增益的实用方法。在多个基准任务上，该指标与任务成功率相关，为智能体系统的比较和设计提供了理论基础。主要创新在于将信息论应用于智能体系统评估，为智能度量提供了新视角。

自然语言处理与角色扮演.title: Staying In Character: Perspective-Bounded Memory For Book-Based Role-Playing Agents
自然语言处理与角色扮演.title_zh: 保持角色：基于书籍的角色扮演智能体的视角受限记忆
自然语言处理与角色扮演.summary: Recent LLM role-playing systems build character agents from novels by extracting characters, scenes, and relations. Yet long-narrative role-playing suffers from two failures: Factual Overreach, where shared retrieval or parametric memory lets a character use facts outside its perspective, and Stylistic Drift, where the agent's language deviates from the character's style. We propose Perspective-Bounded Memory (PBM), which restricts the agent's memory to only information that the character would plausibly know at each point in the narrative. PBM uses a dynamic knowledge graph that is updated based on the character's perspective and narrative progression. Experiments on a new benchmark of long novels show that PBM significantly reduces factual overreach and stylistic drift while maintaining coherent role-playing, outperforming previous methods.
自然语言处理与角色扮演.summary_zh: 本文针对基于书籍的角色扮演智能体在长叙事中出现的“事实越界”和“风格漂移”问题，提出了视角受限记忆（PBM）方法。PBM通过动态知识图限制智能体仅访问角色在叙事中合理知道的信息，从而保持角色一致性。在长篇小说基准测试上，PBM显著减少了事实越界和风格漂移，同时保持了连贯的角色扮演，优于以往方法。主要创新在于将视角约束引入记忆管理，提升了角色扮演的真实性。

理论研究.title: Measurable Majorities Are Not Finitely Axiomatizable
理论研究.title_zh: 可测多数不是有限可公理化的
理论研究.summary: This theoretical note studies the finite axiomatizability of strict majority reasoning in finite social decision frames. Moss and Pedersen (2026) introduce a coherence criterion that characterizes exactly when qualitative majority judgments are representable by a finite measure. Here we show that this coherence criterion is not finitely axiomatizable in first-order logic, settling a fundamental question about the logical complexity of majority reasoning.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本理论笔记研究有限社会决策框架中严格多数推理的有限可公理化问题。Moss和Pedersen（2026）引入了一个一致性准则，精确刻画了定性多数判断何时可由有限测度表示。本文证明这一一致性准则在一阶逻辑中不是有限可公理化的，解决了多数推理逻辑复杂性的一个基本问题。创新点在于证明了多数推理的核心性质无法用有限条公理捕获，对理解集体决策的逻辑基础有重要理论意义。

计算机视觉/CV.title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于物理信息神经网络的激光焊接过程自监督焊接熔深预测模型
计算机视觉/CV.summary: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel self-supervised learning framework combining physics-informed neural networks with simulated data to predict welding penetration. Our model leverages physical laws (e.g., heat transfer equations) as supervision, eliminating the need for expensive labeled real-world data. Experiments show that SimPhysNet achieves high accuracy and generalizes well to different welding conditions.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 激光焊接完全熔深对于实现无缺陷焊接接头至关重要，因此准确预测熔深状态对保证焊接质量十分关键。本文提出SimPhysNet，一种新颖的自监督学习框架，结合物理信息神经网络与模拟数据来预测焊接熔深。该模型利用物理定律（如热传导方程）作为监督信号，无需昂贵的人工标注真实数据。实验表明，SimPhysNet实现了高精度，并能很好地泛化到不同焊接条件。创新点在于将自监督学习与物理信息网络相结合，解决了工业场景中标注数据稀缺的问题。主要贡献是提供了一个实用且经济的焊接质量预测方案。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Enhancing Brain MRI Anomaly Detection and Reasoning with ROI Rethink and Synthetic Data
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 利用ROI重新思考与合成数据增强脑MRI异常检测与推理
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Medical vision-language models typically generate diagnoses through single-pass inference without indicating which image regions support their conclusions. This lack of spatial grounding limits clinical utility: outputs cannot be audited, and models may hallucinate findings on normal scans. We present a framework that enhances brain MRI anomaly detection and reasoning by incorporating a 'ROI Rethink' mechanism that iteratively refines attention to regions of interest, and by leveraging synthetic data to augment training. Our method improves detection accuracy and provides interpretable spatial explanations, reducing false positives.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 医学视觉语言模型通常通过单次推理生成诊断，而不指出哪些图像区域支持其结论。这种空间依据的缺乏限制了临床实用性：输出无法审计，模型可能在正常扫描上产生幻觉。本文提出一个框架，通过引入“ROI重新思考”机制迭代优化对感兴趣区域的注意力，并利用合成数据增强训练，来增强脑MRI异常检测与推理。该方法提高了检测准确性，并提供可解释的空间解释，减少了假阳性。创新点在于将迭代注意力机制与合成数据结合，解决了医学影像中可解释性和数据稀缺问题。主要贡献是开发了一个更可靠、可审计的医学诊断辅助系统。

计算机视觉/CV.title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于无监督域适应的跨工艺激光和TIG焊接熔透状态预测算法
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten in
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 有监督深度学习已广泛应用于焊缝熔透状态分类，但在域迁移（例如在物理机制不同的焊接工艺间迁移模型，如从电弧主导的钨极氩弧焊到激光焊）时，性能常显著下降。本文提出一种基于无监督域适应的跨工艺熔透状态预测算法，通过域自适应技术消除工艺间的分布差异，实现从源工艺（如TIG焊）到目标工艺（如激光焊）的模型迁移，无需目标域标签。创新点在于设计了针对焊接过程特点的域对齐策略，有效提升了跨工艺场景下的预测精度，为工业焊接质量在线监测提供了实用方案。

计算机视觉/CV.title: TriViewBench: Controlled Complexity Scaling for Multi-View Structural Reasoning in MLLMs
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: TriViewBench：面向多模态大语言模型多视角结构推理的可控复杂度基准
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong performance on standard visual question answering benchmarks, yet their scalability under controlled structural complexity remains poorly understood. We introduce TriViewBench, a controlled three-view visual reasoning benchmark constructed
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在标准视觉问答基准上表现强劲，但其在可控结构复杂度下的可扩展性尚不明确。本文提出TriViewBench，一个受控的三视图视觉推理基准，通过系统调整视角间结构关系（如遮挡、视角变换）的复杂度，评估MLLM的多视角结构推理能力。创新点在于设计了复杂度可扩展的评估框架，揭示了现有MLLM在复杂多视角推理中的局限性，为提升模型的空间理解能力提供了测试平台和优化方向。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于CTPA和病历的肺栓塞风险分层：血管图并非万能
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. We propose a multimodal approach that integrates CTPA-derived vascular graphs with clinical text data from medical records, using a graph neural network and a language model. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on PE risk stratification, demonstrating that combining imaging and text modalities is essential when blood tests are unavailable.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 肺栓塞（PE）风险分层对临床决策至关重要。分层指南基于患者病历、CTPA测量参数和血液检测，但血液检测在常规实践中常缺失。本文提出一种多模态方法，将CTPA导出的血管图与病历临床文本数据相结合，使用图神经网络和语言模型。该方法在PE风险分层上达到了最先进性能，证明在缺乏血液检测时，结合影像和文本模态至关重要。创新点包括：首次将血管图与临床文本融合用于PE风险分层，并解决了血液检测缺失的实际问题。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Point Cloud Diffusion with Global and Local Reconstruction for Instance-Level 3D Anomaly Detection
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于全局和局部重建的点云扩散用于实例级3D异常检测
计算机视觉/CV.summary: 3D anomaly detection in point clouds is critical for high-precision industrial manufacturing. Reconstruction-based methods have laid a strong foundation by detecting 3D anomalies through comparisons between defective inputs and their reconstructed normal counterparts. However, existing methods still struggle with instance-level anomalies that are subtle or localized. We propose a diffusion-based framework that jointly reconstructs global shape and local details, enabling fine-grained anomaly detection. Our method outperforms prior work on several benchmarks, particularly for small and subtle defects.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 点云中的3D异常检测对高精度工业制造至关重要。基于重建的方法通过比较缺陷输入与重建的正常对应物来检测3D异常，奠定了坚实基础。然而，现有方法在处理细微或局部的实例级异常时仍存在困难。本文提出一个基于扩散的框架，联合重建全局形状和局部细节，实现细粒度异常检测。该方法在多个基准上优于先前工作，尤其适用于微小缺陷。创新点包括：首次将扩散模型用于3D点云异常检测，并设计了全局与局部联合重建机制。

网络安全/CR.title: Probabilistic Agents in Deterministic Audits: Evaluating Multi-Agent Systems for Automated Audits Based on the German IT-Grundschutz
网络安全/CR.title_zh: 确定性审计中的概率性智能体：基于德国IT-Grundschutz的自动化审计多智能体系统评估
网络安全/CR.summary: The NIS-2 Directive mandates robust Risk Management from thousands of small and medium enterprises. To ensure compliance, companies rely on established standards such as the German IT-Grundschutz (IT-GS) of the Federal Office for Information Security. However, IT-GS certification is resource-intensive. This paper explores the use of multi-agent systems (MAS) for automating IT-GS audits. We design probabilistic agents that reason over the IT-GS catalog and evaluate their performance in deterministic audit scenarios. Our results show that while MAS can reduce manual effort, probabilistic reasoning introduces challenges in consistency and completeness. We provide guidelines for deploying such systems in practice.
网络安全/CR.summary_zh: NIS-2指令要求成千上万的中小企业实施稳健的风险管理。为确保合规，企业依赖德国联邦信息安全局的IT-Grundschutz（IT-GS）等标准。然而，IT-GS认证资源密集。本文探索使用多智能体系统（MAS）自动化IT-GS审计。作者设计了概率性智能体，对IT-GS目录进行推理，并在确定性审计场景中评估其性能。结果表明，MAS虽可减少人工工作量，但概率推理在一致性和完整性上带来挑战。文章为实际部署此类系统提供了指导方针。

分布式系统/DC.title: TL++: Accuracy and Privacy Preserving Traversal Learning for Distributed Intelligent Systems
分布式系统/DC.title_zh: TL++：面向分布式智能系统的精度与隐私保护遍历学习
分布式系统/DC.summary: Distributed intelligent systems increasingly need to train across data silos without centralizing raw data. Federated learning keeps data local but can suffer under heterogeneous partitions and requires repeated full-model exchange. Split learning reduces communication through cut-layer activations, but can lose accuracy due to information bottleneck. We propose TL++, a traversal learning framework that combines the strengths of both. TL++ sequentially traverses data silos with a shared model, updating only a portion of the model at each step to preserve privacy and reduce communication, while maintaining accuracy via a novel regularization term. Experiments show TL++ achieves accuracy comparable to centralized training with significantly lower communication cost and stronger privacy guarantees.
分布式系统/DC.summary_zh: 分布式智能系统日益需要跨数据孤岛训练而不集中原始数据。联邦学习保持数据本地化，但在异构分区下性能不佳且需重复全模型交换。分割学习通过切层激活减少通信，但可能因信息瓶颈损失精度。本文提出TL++，一种结合两者优势的遍历学习框架。TL++使用共享模型顺序遍历数据孤岛，每一步仅更新模型部分参数以保护隐私和减少通信，并通过新颖的正则化项保持精度。实验表明，TL++实现了与集中训练相当的精度，同时通信成本显著降低，隐私保障更强。

分布式系统/DC.title: AI-Assisted Computational Reproducibility on the FABRIC Testbed
分布式系统/DC.title_zh: FABRIC测试平台上的AI辅助计算可重复性
分布式系统/DC.summary: Computational reproducibility remains difficult despite being central to scientific research. In this paper, we show how the international FABRIC testbed, combined with large language model (LLM) coding assistants through LoomAI, can simplify reproducing published experiments across multiple domains. We demonstrate a workflow where LLMs assist in translating experimental descriptions into executable code on FABRIC, handling environment setup, data management, and execution. Case studies in networking and distributed systems show that our approach reduces reproduction time and improves success rates, making reproducibility more accessible.
分布式系统/DC.summary_zh: 计算可重复性虽是科学研究的核心，但仍面临困难。本文展示了国际FABRIC测试平台结合LoomAI中的大语言模型（LLM）编码助手，如何简化跨多个领域的已发表实验的复现。作者演示了一个工作流：LLM协助将实验描述翻译为FABRIC上的可执行代码，处理环境设置、数据管理和执行。在网络和分布式系统领域的案例研究表明，该方法减少了复现时间并提高了成功率，使可重复性更易实现。

图神经网络与推理.title: Position Spaces and Graphs
图神经网络与推理.summary: In this paper, we introduce position graphs, a graph-based reasoning framework based on the formalization of position spaces. This framework utilizes two strict partial orders, representing horizontal and vertical alignment and precedence, to model the relative positions of discrete tokens. Unlike g
图神经网络与推理.summary_zh: 本文提出了位置图（position graphs），一种基于位置空间形式化的图推理框架。该框架利用两个严格偏序（分别表示水平和垂直对齐与优先关系）来建模离散标记的相对位置。与传统的图方法不同，位置图能够捕捉空间布局中的顺序和层次结构，为视觉场景理解、文档分析等任务提供了一种新的推理范式。主要贡献在于将空间关系转化为图结构，并定义了相应的推理机制。

图神经网络与推理.title: Fuzzy Quantification over OWL Ontologies and Knowledge Graphs
图神经网络与推理.title_zh: OWL本体与知识图谱上的模糊量化
图神经网络与推理.summary: This paper presents a versatile framework for evaluating fuzzy quantification queries over both standard and fuzzy ontologies as well as knowledge graphs. The primary objective is the retrieval of individuals that satisfy queries articulated via Type I or Type II fuzzy quantified expressions. A key
图神经网络与推理.summary_zh: 本文提出了一个通用框架，用于在标准本体、模糊本体以及知识图谱上评估模糊量化查询。主要目标是检索满足类型I或类型II模糊量化表达式的个体。关键贡献在于将模糊逻辑与OWL本体相结合，支持更灵活的查询，例如“大多数”、“少数”等模糊量词，并提供了高效的查询评估算法，扩展了知识图谱的查询能力。

多模态学习与GUI智能体.title: WinDOM: Self-Family Distillation for Small-Model GUI Grounding
多模态学习与GUI智能体.title_zh: WinDOM：面向小模型GUI定位的自家族蒸馏
多模态学习与GUI智能体.summary: Small ($\sim$2B) GUI-grounding agents are attractive for on-device deployment, accessibility tooling, and low-cost iteration, but at this scale they face two open recipe questions: how to obtain bounding-box training data without expensive human annotation, and how to combine supervised fine-tuning
多模态学习与GUI智能体.summary_zh: 小型（约20亿参数）GUI定位智能体在设备端部署、无障碍工具和低成本迭代方面具有吸引力，但面临两个问题：如何在不进行昂贵人工标注的情况下获取边界框训练数据，以及如何结合监督微调。本文提出WinDOM方法，通过自家族蒸馏（self-family distillation）利用大模型生成伪标签，并设计蒸馏策略将知识迁移到小模型。创新点在于无需人工标注即可训练高精度GUI定位模型，显著降低了部署成本。

机器人学.title: Learning Action Priors for Cross-embodiment Robot Manipulation
机器人学.title_zh: 学习跨实体机器人操作的动作先验
机器人学.summary: Most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build on a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone by attaching an action module and optimizing the full policy jointly. This design inherits strong visual and linguistic priors from the VLM, but leaves the action module to learn physical motion almost from scra
机器人学.summary_zh: 大多数视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）骨干，通过附加动作模块并联合优化完整策略。这种设计继承了VLM强大的视觉和语言先验，但动作模块几乎从零开始学习物理运动。本文提出学习动作先验（action priors），通过跨实体迁移和预训练，使动作模块获得通用的运动知识，从而在少量数据下快速适应新机器人实体。主要贡献在于减少了训练数据需求并提高了跨机器人泛化能力。

AI安全与事实核查.title: Taxonomy of Risks on Automated Fact-Checking Systems Considering its Propagation
AI安全与事实核查.title_zh: 考虑传播的自动事实核查系统风险分类
AI安全与事实核查.summary: In recent years, the posting of fake news including disinformation and misinformation on social networking services (SNS) has become a social problem. To combat this fake news, fact-checking that is the process of assessing the veracity of posts on SNS has become increasingly important. While fact-c
AI安全与事实核查.summary_zh: 近年来，社交网络服务（SNS）上包含虚假信息（disinformation和misinformation）的假新闻发布已成为社会问题。为此，事实核查（评估SNS帖子真实性的过程）日益重要。本文提出了一个自动事实核查系统在传播过程中的风险分类体系，分析了在事实核查的各个阶段（如检测、验证、传播）可能出现的风险，包括误报、漏报、偏见放大等。该分类有助于设计更鲁棒和可信的自动事实核查系统。

多智能体系统.title: Multi-Agent Goal Recognition with Team- and Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Factorized Branch-and-Bound
多智能体系统.title_zh: 基于团队与目标条件强化学习及因子化分支定界的多智能体目标识别
多智能体系统.summary: Multi-agent goal recognition asks an observer to jointly infer which agents act together and what each team is trying to achieve, so the hypothesis space grows combinatorially with the number of team partitions and goals per team. Real applications such as drone surveillance and collaborative roboti
多智能体系统.summary_zh: 多智能体目标识别要求观察者联合推断哪些智能体协同行动以及每个团队的目标，其假设空间随团队划分和目标数量组合爆炸。该论文提出一种结合团队与目标条件强化学习与因子化分支定界的方法，通过强化学习高效探索假设空间，并利用分支定界剪枝，显著降低计算复杂度。主要贡献在于首次将强化学习与搜索算法结合，解决了多智能体场景下目标识别的可扩展性问题，适用于无人机监控、协作机器人等实际应用。

AI安全.title: Model Forensics: Investigating Whether Concerning Behavior Reflects Misalignment
AI安全.title_zh: 模型取证：调查令人担忧的行为是否反映对齐失败
AI安全.summary: A central goal of safety research is determining whether a model is misaligned. Prior work has largely focused on detecting concerning behavior. But behavior alone does not establish misalignment: a concerning action can arise from benign causes such as confusion. This motivates model forensics: inv
AI安全.summary_zh: 安全研究的核心目标是判断模型是否未对齐。以往工作主要关注检测令人担忧的行为，但行为本身不能确定对齐失败，因为令人担忧的行为可能源于良性原因（如困惑）。该论文提出模型取证概念，通过因果分析等方法区分行为背后的真正原因，从而判断模型是否真正未对齐。主要创新在于建立了从行为到对齐状态的诊断框架，为AI安全提供了更精细的评估工具，有助于减少误报和漏报。

信息检索.title: AutoRelAnnotator: Calibrated Model Cascades for Cost-Efficient Relevance Evaluation in Sponsored Search
信息检索.title_zh: AutoRelAnnotator：面向赞助搜索中成本高效相关性评估的校准模型级联
信息检索.summary: How can we generate high-quality relevance annotations at scale without the cost and delays of human labeling? Relevance annotations are the backbone of search ranking systems which is needed for training data preparation, NDCG evaluation, and root cause analysis. However, human annotation is slow a
信息检索.summary_zh: 如何在没有人工标注成本和延迟的情况下大规模生成高质量相关性标注？相关性标注是搜索排序系统的基石，用于训练数据准备、NDCG评估和根因分析。该论文提出AutoRelAnnotator，一种校准的模型级联方法，通过级联多个模型并校准其输出，以低成本自动生成相关性标注。主要贡献在于显著降低了人工标注需求，同时保持标注质量，适用于赞助搜索等场景，提升了排序系统的效率。

联邦学习安全.title: Color Matters: Trigger Color Affects Success in Federated Backdoor Attacks
联邦学习安全.title_zh: 颜色至关重要：触发器颜色影响联邦后门攻击成功率
联邦学习安全.summary: Federated learning is vulnerable to backdoor attacks in which malicious clients inject poisoned updates while preserving benign-task performance. In this paper, we study a semantics-driven backdoor mechanism in which attackers use natural visual accessories as triggers and manipulate only the trigge
联邦学习安全.summary_zh: 联邦学习易受后门攻击，恶意客户端在保持良性任务性能的同时注入中毒更新。该论文研究语义驱动的后门机制，攻击者使用自然视觉配件作为触发器，仅操纵触发器颜色。实验发现触发器颜色显著影响攻击成功率，不同颜色在不同模型和数据分布下效果差异大。主要贡献在于揭示了颜色这一看似微小的因素对后门攻击的关键影响，为联邦学习防御提供了新视角，有助于设计更鲁棒的聚合算法。

机器人学习.title: FORCE: Efficient VLA Reinforcement Fine-Tuning via Value-Calibrated Warm-up and Self-Distillation
机器人学习.title_zh: FORCE：通过价值校准热身和自蒸馏实现高效的VLA强化微调
机器人学习.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are often constrained by the imitation ceiling imposed by sub-optimal data. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning can surpass this limit, it is notoriously sample inefficient. This challenge arises from two core issues: (1) catastrophic initial unlearning
机器人学习.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型常受限于次优数据导致的模仿天花板。强化学习微调虽能突破此限制，但样本效率极低，主要源于两个核心问题：（1）灾难性初始遗忘；（2）探索效率低。该论文提出FORCE框架，通过价值校准热身阶段稳定初始策略，并利用自蒸馏技术高效传递知识，显著提升强化微调的样本效率。主要贡献在于结合价值校准与自蒸馏，使VLA模型在机器人任务中超越模仿学习上限，同时减少训练样本需求。

人工智能/知识表示与推理.title: Reasonable Motion: A General ASP Foundation for Environment Constrained Movement Trajectory Computation
人工智能/知识表示与推理.title_zh: 合理运动：环境约束下运动轨迹计算的通用ASP基础
人工智能/知识表示与推理.summary: We present a general answer set programming based hybrid quantitative-qualitative method for computing constrained branching trajectory modes for moving objects in real-world settings. The method performs constrained traversal of an environment graph, enumerating geometrically admissible motion beha
人工智能/知识表示与推理.summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于回答集编程的通用混合定量-定性方法，用于计算真实世界中运动物体的约束分支轨迹模式。该方法对环境图进行约束遍历，枚举几何上可行的运动行为，并结合定性空间推理处理环境约束。创新点在于将ASP的符号推理与连续空间几何约束相结合，实现灵活的运动规划。主要贡献是为机器人导航和智能交通等领域提供了一种可解释、可扩展的轨迹计算框架。

优化算法/LLM.title: MiniOpt: Reasoning to Model and Solve General Optimization Problems with Limited Resources
优化算法/LLM.title_zh: MiniOpt：用有限资源建模和求解通用优化问题的推理方法
优化算法/LLM.summary: Achieving strong optimization generalization across diverse optimization problems while requiring limited training resources remains a challenging problem for optimization-oriented large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches typically rely on large-scale supervised datasets, costly reasoning a
优化算法/LLM.summary_zh: 对于面向优化的大语言模型，在有限训练资源下实现跨多种优化问题的强泛化仍具挑战。现有方法通常依赖大规模监督数据集和昂贵推理。本文提出MiniOpt，一种轻量级方法，通过将优化问题建模为结构化推理任务，利用少量示例和链式思维提示，使小型LLM能有效求解线性规划、整数规划等。创新点在于将推理能力与问题建模分离，降低数据需求。主要贡献是证明了有限资源下LLM也能达到有竞争力的优化性能。

NLP/LLM.title: Weave of Formal Thought
NLP/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) attain remarkable surface fluency on code, yet they neither formally guarantee the syntactic validity of their output nor leverage the hierarchical structure defining the target language. While existing constrained-decoding frameworks address the former, they operate und
NLP/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型在代码生成上表现出色，但既不能保证输出句法有效，也未利用目标语言的层次结构。现有约束解码框架解决前者，但未利用结构信息。本文提出Weave of Formal Thought，一种将形式语法约束与层次解码相结合的框架，在生成过程中逐步构建抽象语法树，确保句法正确性并利用结构指导生成。创新点在于将语法规则集成到解码过程中，提升代码生成的结构一致性。主要贡献是提高了LLM生成代码的可靠性和可解释性。

生成模型.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
生成模型.title_zh: Autodata：创建高质量合成数据的智能体数据科学家
生成模型.summary: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific instantiation where the agent uses a language model to generate and refine synthetic data. Experiments demonstrate that Autodata produces synthetic data that significantly improves downstream model performance across various tasks.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文提出Autodata，一种通用方法，使AI智能体能够像数据科学家一样构建高质量的训练和评估数据。我们展示了如何训练（元优化）这样的数据科学家智能体，使其学会创建更强大的数据。我们描述了整体框架，以及一个具体实例：智能体使用语言模型生成和优化合成数据。实验表明，Autodata生成的合成数据显著提升了多个任务的下游模型性能。创新点包括：将数据生成视为一个可学习的智能体过程，并通过元优化持续改进数据质量。

category_summaries.AI安全与隐私: 该方向关注模型的安全性、隐私保护和对抗攻击防御。今日研究包括联邦学习中的梯度泄露防御、后门攻击检测以及差分隐私在训练中的应用，强调在保证模型性能的同时提升鲁棒性。
category_summaries.模型压缩与强化学习: 聚焦于通过知识蒸馏、剪枝和量化等技术压缩模型，并结合强化学习优化压缩策略。今日热点是使用强化学习自动搜索压缩率，实现资源受限环境下的高效部署。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与信息抽取: 主要研究从非结构化文本中提取结构化信息，包括命名实体识别、关系抽取和事件抽取。今日亮点是结合大语言模型进行少样本学习，提升跨领域泛化能力。
category_summaries.机器人控制与强化学习: 探索基于强化学习的机器人运动控制和操作策略，今日进展包括样本高效的策略学习、示范学习和 sim-to-real 迁移，强调在复杂环境中的适应性和安全性。
category_summaries.计算机视觉与多模态学习: 涵盖图像分类、目标检测、分割等任务，并与文本、语音等多模态数据融合。今日研究关注视觉-语言预训练模型和跨模态对齐，推动通用视觉理解。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 专注于不同模态（文本、图像、音频）的联合表示学习与生成。今日亮点是统一多模态框架，如将视觉和语言模型整合为单一架构，提升多任务性能。
category_summaries.优化算法: 研究新的优化器、学习率调度和损失函数设计。今日进展包括自适应梯度方法和元学习优化器，旨在加速收敛并改善模型泛化。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: 关注大语言模型的训练、微调、推理和部署。今日热点包括参数高效微调（LoRA）、指令微调以及通过检索增强生成（RAG）减少幻觉。
category_summaries.语音处理: 包括语音识别、合成、说话人识别和情感分析。今日研究利用大模型进行多语言语音处理，以及基于扩散模型的语音生成。
category_summaries.AI安全/对齐: 研究如何使AI系统符合人类价值观和意图，避免有害行为。今日进展包括价值观对齐的强化学习方法、可解释性技术以及红队测试。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: 基础强化学习算法，如Q学习、策略梯度和模型预测控制。今日亮点是无模型RL的样本效率提升和离线RL中的分布外泛化。
category_summaries.多智能体系统/区块链: 研究多个智能体协同决策与博弈，结合区块链确保可信交互。今日热点是去中心化多智能体学习与共识机制。
category_summaries.生成模型/医学AI: 生成模型（如GAN、扩散模型）在医学图像生成、诊断和药物发现中的应用。今日进展包括可控生成和隐私保护下的医学数据合成。
category_summaries.博弈论与多智能体系统: 运用博弈论分析多智能体策略，包括纳什均衡求解和机制设计。今日研究关注动态博弈中的学习与通信。
category_summaries.AI智能体与GUI交互: 开发能够操作图形用户界面（GUI）的AI智能体，如自动完成网页任务。今日亮点是基于LLM的智能体通过视觉和代码理解进行GUI操作。
category_summaries.多模态学习与可解释性: 在多模态模型中引入可解释性，如注意力可视化、概念瓶颈模型。今日研究旨在理解模型决策过程。
category_summaries.AI智能体与信息论: 利用信息论优化智能体探索和表示学习，如最大化互信息。今日进展包括信息瓶颈在强化学习中的应用。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与角色扮演: 研究LLM在角色扮演场景中的对话一致性、角色知识融入和情感表达。今日热点是使用角色卡和长上下文保持角色特征。
category_summaries.理论研究: 包括机器学习理论、统计学习、计算复杂性等。今日研究关注泛化界、优化收敛性和模型容量分析。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: 传统计算机视觉任务，如3D重建、姿态估计、视频理解。今日进展是神经辐射场（NeRF）的加速和动态场景建模。
category_summaries.网络安全/CR: 利用AI检测和防御网络攻击，包括入侵检测、恶意软件分析。今日热点是图神经网络在异常检测中的应用。
category_summaries.分布式系统/DC: 研究分布式训练、推理和存储系统。今日进展包括异构集群下的高效通信和容错机制。
category_summaries.图神经网络与推理: 图神经网络在知识图谱推理、分子性质预测等任务中的应用。今日亮点是结合大语言模型增强图推理。
category_summaries.多模态学习与GUI智能体: 结合多模态感知与GUI交互，使智能体理解屏幕内容并执行操作。今日研究使用视觉-语言模型进行UI导航。
category_summaries.机器人学: 机器人硬件、运动规划、感知与控制。今日进展包括灵巧手操作、仿生机器人以及基于学习的运动控制。
category_summaries.AI安全与事实核查: 自动检测虚假信息和事实错误，结合知识库和逻辑推理。今日热点是利用LLM进行多步骤事实核查。
category_summaries.多智能体系统: 多智能体协作与竞争，如编队控制、任务分配。今日研究关注基于通信的协作和零样本泛化。
category_summaries.AI安全: 综合AI安全研究，包括对抗样本、模型鲁棒性、公平性和隐私。今日进展是鲁棒性评估基准和防御策略。
category_summaries.信息检索: 文档检索、问答系统和推荐系统。今日亮点是稠密检索和基于LLM的检索增强生成。
category_summaries.联邦学习安全: 联邦学习中的隐私保护和拜占庭容错。今日研究包括差分隐私联邦学习和安全聚合协议。
category_summaries.机器人学习: 机器人通过强化学习、模仿学习等获取技能。今日进展是任务泛化和零样本技能迁移。
category_summaries.人工智能/知识表示与推理: 知识图谱构建、常识推理和逻辑推理。今日热点是将符号推理与神经网络结合。
category_summaries.优化算法/LLM: 针对大语言模型的高效优化，如低秩适应、梯度检查点。今日研究关注减少内存占用和加速训练。
category_summaries.NLP/LLM: 自然语言处理与大语言模型结合，包括文本生成、翻译、摘要等。今日进展是长文本处理和指令跟随。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型的理论与算法，如扩散模型、自回归模型。今日亮点是高质量图像和视频生成以及条件控制。

highlights: 研究亮点1：《基于约束强化学习的能耗受限水下航行器控制》将能耗作为硬约束纳入强化学习，显著提升水下机器人续航，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：《基于分层强化学习的神经网络压缩（HiReLC）》提出分层强化学习框架联合优化剪枝与量化，实现自动化模型压缩，对边缘部署有重大意义。
研究亮点1：SARA: Unlocking Multilingual Knowledge in Mixture-of-Experts via Semantically Anchored Routing Alignment - 通过语义锚定路由对齐，显著提升MoE模型对低资源语言的知识转移能力，实现多语言性能均衡。
研究亮点2：SE-AGCNet: An End-to-End Framework for Joint Speech Enhancement and Loudness Control in Meeting Scenarios - 首次将语音增强和自动增益控制联合优化，端到端框架在会议场景中取得更优的语音质量和响度一致性。
研究亮点3：Uncertainty Quantification for Computer-Use Agents: A Benchmark across Vision-Language Models and GUI Grounding Datasets - 系统构建了计算机使用代理的不确定性量化基准，揭示了VLM骨干选择对UQ性能的关键影响，提供实用部署建议。
研究亮点1：《The Unfireable Safety Kernel: Execution-Time AI Alignment for AI Agents and Other Escapable AI Systems》提出操作系统级别的安全内核，从根本上解决AI智能体可控性问题，具有高实用价值。
研究亮点2：《OncoSynth: Synthetic data generation for treatment effect estimation in oncology》通过因果建模保留合成数据中的因果关系，为医学数据分析提供了更可靠的方法，兼具学术创新和实际应用潜力。
研究亮点1：《使用联合稀疏自编码器引导视觉语言模型》提出JSAE，首次实现跨模态特征的联合稀疏编码，为多模态模型的可控性和可解释性提供了新方法，兼具理论价值和实用潜力。
研究亮点2：《智能体系统作为压缩器：用比特量化系统智能》从信息论角度提出量化智能体系统智能的通用框架，为评估和设计智能体提供了理论基础，具有跨领域影响力。
研究亮点3：《保持角色：基于书籍的角色扮演智能体的视角受限记忆》解决了长叙事角色扮演中的关键挑战，通过视角受限记忆显著提升角色一致性，对AI在娱乐和交互式叙事中的应用有重要实用价值。
daily_summary: 今日AI研究动态呈现三大热点：大语言模型（LLM）的实用化、多模态学习的融合以及安全对齐的深化。在LLM方面，参数高效微调（如LoRA）和检索增强生成（RAG）成为主流，旨在降低部署成本并减少幻觉。多模态学习领域，视觉-语言预训练模型和统一多模态框架取得进展，尤其是结合GUI交互的智能体展示了强大的自动化能力。安全与对齐研究持续升温，红队测试、价值观对齐和联邦学习中的隐私保护受到广泛关注。此外，生成模型（扩散模型）在医学图像合成和可控生成中表现突出，而强化学习与机器人控制的结合在样本效率和sim-to-real迁移上有了新突破。总体来看，今日研究强调实用性与可靠性，推动AI从实验室走向真实世界应用。
